title: adhatoda quadrifaria
intro: Adhatoda quadrifaria, also known as Adhatoda vasica or Malabar nut, is a plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and belongs to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Adhatoda quadrifaria include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, powder, and tincture, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
